---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/peter-raidl-6b48621b2/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Paeddasan
---

Dear reader,

This blog is my effort to make sense of everything related to *exercise science*, *human movement,* and *psychology*. It is said that many great scientist answered in a similar way when asked about the practical implications of their findings:

*We don't do it because it is important - We do it because it is interesting.*

This blog is mainly a personal experiment. (No, I do not need a hypothesis for that.) Feel free to leave comments or send me a message. No ***likes*** or ***subscriptions*** needed.

Peter Raidl
